summary: Add a synthetic Family Bertus interaction example
description: Extend the public Family Bertus case study with a clearly labelled synthetic Dutch example showing the morning briefing, numbered actions, grocery list, and natural-language commands such as adding a 10:00 calendar item. Keep all names, messages, schedules, identifiers, and infrastructure fictional and public-safe.
acceptance: The case study visibly demonstrates a Dutch Goedemorgen briefing with agenda, numbered actions, and a grocery list.
The example shows how a person addresses Bertus to add a 10:00 calendar item and household items.
The example is explicitly synthetic and contains no real names, conversations, schedules, IDs, tokens, endpoints, or infrastructure details.
The section matches the current square near-black site style and remains accessible and overflow-free on desktop and 390px mobile.

evidence.summary: npm test: 57 passed; npm run check:ci: passed (142 pages, 0 SEO regressions); git diff --check: passed; desktop browser: no console errors or horizontal overflow; mobile 390px screenshot: no clipping or horizontal overflow; public boundary scan: no credentials, chat IDs, or private markers
